From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[Poland](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Poland "wiktionary:Poland")*** or ***[Póland](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/P%C3%B3land "wiktionary:Póland")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**[Poland](/wiki/Poland "Poland")** is a country in Central Europe.

**Poland** may also refer to:

## Historical political entities

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Poland_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Historical political entities")]

* [Duchy of Poland (c. 960–1025)](/wiki/Duchy_of_Poland_(c._960%E2%80%931025) "Duchy of Poland (c. 960–1025)"), a duchy existing from around 960 to 1025
* [Kingdom of Poland (1025–1031)](/wiki/Kingdom_of_Poland_(1025%E2%80%931031) "Kingdom of Poland (1025–1031)"), a kingdom existing from 1025 to 1031
* [Duchy of Poland (1031–1076)](/wiki/Duchy_of_Poland_(1031%E2%80%931076) "Duchy of Poland (1031–1076)"), a duchy existing from 1031 to 1076
* [Kingdom of Poland (1076–1079)](/wiki/Kingdom_of_Poland_(1076%E2%80%931079) "Kingdom of Poland (1076–1079)"), a kingdom existing from 1076 to 1079
* [Duchy of Poland (1079–1138)](/wiki/Duchy_of_Poland_(1079%E2%80%931138) "Duchy of Poland (1079–1138)"), a duchy existing from 1079 to 1138
* [Duchy of Poland (1138–1227)](/wiki/Duchy_of_Poland_(1138%E2%80%931227) "Duchy of Poland (1138–1227)"), a confederal duchy existing from 1138 to 1227
* [Kingdom of Poland (1295–1296)](/wiki/Kingdom_of_Poland_(1295%E2%80%931296) "Kingdom of Poland (1295–1296)"), a kingdom in Greater Poland existing from 1295 to 1296, under the rule of Przemysł II
* [Kingdom of Poland (1300–1320)](/wiki/Kingdom_of_Poland_(1300%E2%80%931320) "Kingdom of Poland (1300–1320)"), a confederal duchy existing from 1300 to 1320
* [United Kingdom of Poland](/wiki/United_Kingdom_of_Poland "United Kingdom of Poland"), a kingdom existing from 1320 to 1386
* [Crown of the Kingdom of Poland](/wiki/Crown_of_the_Kingdom_of_Poland "Crown of the Kingdom of Poland"), a kingdom, that from 1385 to 1569 was an independent country, and from 1569 to 1795, was a member state of the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth
* [Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth](/wiki/Polish%E2%80%93Lithuanian_Commonwealth "Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth"), a federal-state existing from 1596 to 1795
* [Congress Poland](/wiki/Congress_Poland "Congress Poland"), a kingdom existing from 1815 to 1867/1915, under the control of Russian Empire
* [Kingdom of Poland (1830–1831)](/wiki/Kingdom_of_Poland_(1830%E2%80%931831) "Kingdom of Poland (1830–1831)"), a rebel state during the November Uprising, existing from 1830 to 1831
* [Polish National Government (January Uprising)](/wiki/Polish_National_Government_(January_Uprising) "Polish National Government (January Uprising)"), a rebel state during the January Uprising, existing from 1863 to 1865
* [Kingdom of Poland (1917–1918)](/wiki/Kingdom_of_Poland_(1917%E2%80%931918) "Kingdom of Poland (1917–1918)"), a client state of the German Empire existing from 1917 to 1918
* [Second Polish Republic](/wiki/Second_Polish_Republic "Second Polish Republic"), a republic existing from 1918 to 1939
  + [Polish government-in-exile](/wiki/Polish_government-in-exile "Polish government-in-exile"), a government-in-exile of Poland, existing from 1939–1990
  + [Polish Underground State](/wiki/Polish_Underground_State "Polish Underground State"), an underground state operating on the territories of the former Second Polish Republic during World War II
* [Provisional Government of the Republic of Poland](/wiki/Provisional_Government_of_the_Republic_of_Poland "Provisional Government of the Republic of Poland"), a provisional government existing from 1944 to 1945
* [Provisional Government of National Unity](/wiki/Provisional_Government_of_National_Unity "Provisional Government of National Unity"), a provisional government existing from 1945 to 1947
* [Polish People's Republic](/wiki/Polish_People%27s_Republic "Polish People's Republic"), a satellite state of Soviet Union, existing from 1947 to 1989

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Poland_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* [*Poland* (album)](/wiki/Poland_(album) "Poland (album)"), a 1984 album by Tangerine Dream
* [Poland (European Parliament constituency)](/wiki/Poland_(European_Parliament_constituency) "Poland (European Parliament constituency)")
* [*Poland* (novel)](/wiki/Poland_(novel) "Poland (novel)"), a 1983 novel by James A. Michener
* [*Poland* (sculpture)](/wiki/Poland_(sculpture) "Poland (sculpture)"), a 1966 work by artist Mark di Suvero
* ["Poland" (song)](/wiki/Poland_(song) "Poland (song)"), a 2022 song by Lil Yachty
* [Poland (surname)](/wiki/Poland_(surname) "Poland (surname)")
* [Poland syndrome](/wiki/Poland_syndrome "Poland syndrome"), a rare birth defect
* [FV *Poland*](/wiki/German_trawler_V_607_D%C3%BCsseldorf "German trawler V 607 Düsseldorf"), a French fishing trawler in service 1949-53
